one_time_description: Council of the Haida Nation transfer of $10,000,000 received in 2024 (nil in prior year)
economic_notes: Old Massett Economic Development Corporation, Old Massett Economic Development Limited Partnership, and 1199196 B.C. Ltd. consolidated. Government business partnerships include Haida Gwaii Forest Products Joint Venture (50%), TLL Yahda Energy Ltd., TLL Yahda Energy Limited Partnership (33%), 1319535 B.C. Ltd., 1319535 Limited Partnership, and 1203559 B.C. Ltd. HGFPJV processes and sells wood products. TYE LP constructs and operates a solar energy farm. BC Housing operating agreement for 12 residential units for low to moderate income households signed during year.
notes: Large one-time $10,000,000 transfer from Council of the Haida Nation in 2024 (nil prior year) drove significant surplus increase. Deferred revenue decreased substantially from $16.3M to $10.0M. Portfolio investments increased from $9.2M to $21.5M. Term loan due on demand of $512,013 from BC Housing for affordable housing development (12 units). Village consolidated 3 subsidiaries and accounts for 6 government business partnerships using modified equity method. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers (ISC + FNHA + Province of BC + Government of Canada + CMHC + Council of the Haida Nation). Child Development segment showed zero actual expenses in 2024 vs budget of $457,800. Adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard effective April 1, 2023 prospectively.
